message:
fix: canonicalize JSONL and storage paths for symlink and external-route support

- graph: avoid redundant storage context reopening for external routes;
  add storage_ctx_targets_beads_dir() with dunce::canonicalize normalization
  to detect when the caller's routed context already points at the beads
  directory, preventing double-open issues with SQLite locking
- history: suppress clippy::too_many_arguments on restore_backup() whose
  parameter count is inherent to the backup restore ceremony
- stats: extract resolve_active_jsonl_path() to read the startup config
  rather than hardcoding .beads/issues.jsonl; add resolve_existing_jsonl_path()
  with symlink canonicalization so recent-activity correctly derives the git
  repo and pathspec even through symlinked beads directories
- Add 5 new unit tests covering canonicalization, symlink resolution, and
  external-route storage context detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
